title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at State Bank of India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at State Bank of India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with State Bank of India! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Vijayawada team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About State Bank of India:
State Bank of India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with State Bank of India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
